meta.title: CNC Machinist Toolkit | Free Calculators & G-Code Tools

meta.name: description
meta.content: Free online CNC tools: Drill Speed & Feed calculator, PCD coordinates, Circular Interpolation, and G-Code generators. Optimized for Fanuc, Haas, and Mazak.

meta.name: keywords
meta.content: cnc machinist tools, g-code generator, speeds and feeds calculator, pcd calculator, drilling rpm calculator, fanuc g-code
Free online CNC tools: Drill Speed & Feed calculator, PCD coordinates, Circular Interpolation, and G-Code generators.
Free online CNC tools: Drill Speed & Feed calculator, PCD coordinates, Circular Interpolation, and G-Code generators.

header.class: relative w-full bg-gray-900 border-b border-gray-700 shadow-sm mb-6

a.class: flex items-center gap-3 text-indigo-400 hover:text-indigo-300 transition-colors no-underline group

nav.class: bg-white border-b border-gray-200 sticky top-0 z-50

span.class: ml-2 px-2 py-1 bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 text-xs font-bold rounded uppercase tracking-wider

section.class: hero-section-cnc pt-24 pb-24 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 text-center relative overflow-hidden

h1.class: text-4xl md:text-6xl font-black text-white mb-6 leading-tight

p.class: text-lg md:text-xl text-slate-300 mb-10 max-w-2xl mx-auto leading-relaxed

div.p: Professional online calculators for Speeds & Feeds, PCD Coordinates, and G-Code generation.

a.class: tool-card bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl block group h-full

div.class: feature-icon w-14 h-14 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl text-white mb-6 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform

h3.class: text-xl font-bold text-slate-900 mb-3 group-hover:text-blue-600 transition

a.p: Calculate optimal Spindle Speed (RPM) and Feed Rate based on your cutter and material.

a.class: tool-card bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl block group h-full

div.class: feature-icon w-14 h-14 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl text-white mb-6 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform

h3.class: text-xl font-bold text-slate-900 mb-3 group-hover:text-blue-600 transition

a.p: Get X and Y coordinates for drilling holes on a Pitch Circle Diameter (bolt circle).

a.class: tool-card bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl block group h-full

div.class: feature-icon w-14 h-14 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl text-white mb-6 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform

h3.class: text-xl font-bold text-slate-900 mb-3 group-hover:text-blue-600 transition

a.p: Generate G02/G03 code for milling internal/external circles and dovetails.

a.class: tool-card bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl block group h-full

div.class: feature-icon w-14 h-14 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl text-white mb-6 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform

h3.class: text-xl font-bold text-slate-900 mb-3 group-hover:text-blue-600 transition

a.p: Quick programs for Face Milling, Simple Contours, and Drill cycles.

a.class: tool-card bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl block group h-full

div.class: feature-icon w-14 h-14 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl text-white mb-6 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform

h3.class: text-xl font-bold text-slate-900 mb-3 group-hover:text-blue-600 transition

a.p: USE CHAMFER G17 in X,Y plane Easy To Use.

a.class: tool-card bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl block group h-full

div.class: feature-icon w-14 h-14 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl text-white mb-6 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform

h3.class: text-xl font-bold text-slate-900 mb-3 group-hover:text-blue-600 transition

a.p: USE CHAMFER G17 in X,Y plane Easy To Use CIRCULAR INTERPOLATION CHAMFER.

a.class: tool-card bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl block group h-full

div.class: feature-icon w-14 h-14 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl text-white mb-6 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform

h3.class: text-xl font-bold text-slate-900 mb-3 group-hover:text-blue-600 transition

a.p: 3D CAD WEBAPP. Design your first model with this lightweight browser tool.

div.class: tool-card bg-slate-50 p-8 rounded-2xl border-dashed border-2 border-slate-200 opacity-70
w-14 h-14 bg-slate-200 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl text-slate-400 mb-6

div.p: Visualize your toolpaths in 2D before running the machine.

span.class: text-slate-400 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider bg-slate-200 px-2 py-1 rounded

footer.class: bg-gray-50 border-t border-gray-200 pt-12 pb-8 mt-12

div.p: Shader7 provides essential digital tools for professionals, students, and businesses. Our mission is to make productivity free and accessible.

p.class: text-xs font-bold text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-2

span.class: ml-2 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs bg-pink-100 text-pink-700 font-medium group-hover:bg-pink-200 transition-colors

div.class: border-t border-gray-200 pt-8 text-center text-sm text-gray-400

div.div: © document.write(new Date().getFullYear()) SHADER7. Designed by Nishikant Xalxo.
